## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New exercise type
- [ ] New AI skill
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate:schemas` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate:config` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded language-specific values (uses `language-utils.js`)
- [ ] Works offline (no network-dependent features without fallback)
- [ ] Updated CLAUDE.md if adding new conventions
- [ ] Updated relevant schema if changing data formats
